Document:
# Mice
Mice are small creatures that inhabit the station's walls, floors, and ventilation shafts. They can fit through gaps and spaces inaccessible to humanoid crew members.
As a mouse you are [bold]very small[/bold], able to move under doors, through vents, and into areas the crew cannot easily reach. You can speak, though interactions with the crew are limited by your size and nature.
You have [bold]no offensive capabilities[/bold] and cannot harm crew members.
## Variants
- [bold]Mouse[/bold]: a standard station mouse. - [bold]Cancer Mouse[/bold]: a mouse with an unusual green glow caused by prolonged radiation exposure. Emits mild [color=LightGreen]radiation[/color], which may affect nearby crew members.
